adhkar.arabicText: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
adhkar.transliteration: Subḥān Allāh
adhkar.translation: Glory be to Allah.

adhkar.arabicText: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
adhkar.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāh
adhkar.translation: All praise is due to Allah.

adhkar.arabicText: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
adhkar.transliteration: Allāhu akbar
adhkar.translation: Allah is the Greatest.

adhkar.arabicText: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
adhkar.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā Allāh, waḥdahu lā sharīka lah, lahu al-mulku wa lahu al-ḥamd, wa huwa ʿalā kulli shayʾin qadīr
adhkar.translation: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise, and He is over all things capable.

adhkar.arabicText: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
adhkar.transliteration: Astaghfiru Allāha wa atūbu ilayh
adhkar.translation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah and turn to Him in repentance.

adhkar.arabicText: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
adhkar.transliteration: Lā ḥawla wa lā quwwata illā billāh
adhkar.translation: There is no might nor power except with Allah.

adhkar.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَىٰ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ
adhkar.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli wa sallim ʿalā nabiyyinā Muḥammad
adhkar.translation: O Allah, send blessings and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.
adhkar.source: صلاة على النبي ﷺ — نحو سورة الأحزاب ٥٦

adhkar.arabicText: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
adhkar.transliteration: Subḥān Allāhi wa biḥamdih, Subḥān Allāhi al-ʿaẓīm
adhkar.translation: Glory be to Allah and praise Him; glory be to Allah the Most Great.

adhkar.arabicText: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَلَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
adhkar.transliteration: Subḥān Allāh, wal-ḥamdu lillāh, wa lā ilāha illā Allāh, wallāhu akbar
adhkar.translation: Glory be to Allah, all praise is due to Allah, there is no god but Allah, and Allah is the Greatest.

adhkar.arabicText: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
adhkar.transliteration: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa al-Ḥayyu al-Qayyūm…
adhkar.translation: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth. (Ayat al-Kursi)

adhkar.arabicText: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
adhkar.transliteration: Aṣbaḥnā wa aṣbaḥa al-mulku lillāh, wal-ḥamdu lillāh, lā ilāha illā Allāh waḥdahu lā sharīka lah
adhkar.translation: We have entered the morning and the dominion belongs to Allah; all praise is due to Allah; there is no god but Allah alone, with no partner.

adhkar.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَىٰ عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
adhkar.transliteration: Allāhumma anta Rabbī lā ilāha illā ant… faghfir lī fa innahu lā yaghfiru adh-dhunūba illā ant
adhkar.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord; there is no god but You. You created me and I am Your servant… so forgive me, for none forgives sins but You. (Sayyid al-Istighfar)

adhkar.arabicText: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا، وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ نَبِيًّا
adhkar.transliteration: Raḍītu billāhi Rabbā, wa bil-Islāmi dīnā, wa bi-Muḥammadin ﷺ nabiyyā
adhkar.translation: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion, and with Muhammad ﷺ as my Prophet.

adhkar.arabicText: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
adhkar.transliteration: Bismillāhi alladhī lā yaḍurru maʿa ismihi shayʾun fī al-arḍi wa lā fī as-samāʾi wa huwa as-Samīʿu al-ʿAlīm
adhkar.translation: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing on earth or in the heaven can cause harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

adhkar.arabicText: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
adhkar.transliteration: Amsaynā wa amsā al-mulku lillāh, wal-ḥamdu lillāh, lā ilāha illā Allāh waḥdahu lā sharīka lah
adhkar.translation: We have entered the evening and the dominion belongs to Allah; all praise is due to Allah; there is no god but Allah alone, with no partner.

adhkar.arabicText: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
adhkar.transliteration: Aʿūdhu bikalimāti Allāhi at-tāmmāti min sharri mā khalaq
adhkar.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

adhkar.arabicText: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ … قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ … قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ
adhkar.transliteration: Sūrat al-Ikhlāṣ, al-Falaq, an-Nās
adhkar.translation: Recite Surat al-Ikhlas (112), al-Falaq (113) and an-Nas (114), three times in the morning and evening for protection.

adhkar.arabicText: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
adhkar.transliteration: Subḥān Allāhi wa biḥamdih
adhkar.translation: Glory be to Allah and praise Him.

adhkar.arabicText: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ (ثلاثًا)، اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
adhkar.transliteration: Astaghfirullāh (×3). Allāhumma anta as-Salām wa minka as-salām, tabārakta yā Dhā al-Jalāli wal-Ikrām
adhkar.translation: I seek Allah's forgiveness (three times). O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace; blessed are You, O Owner of Majesty and Honour.

adhkar.arabicText: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ (٣٣)، الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (٣٣)، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ (٣٣)، وَتَمَامُ الْمِائَةِ: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
adhkar.transliteration: Subḥān Allāh (33), Al-ḥamdu lillāh (33), Allāhu akbar (33), then: Lā ilāha illā Allāh waḥdahu lā sharīka lah…
adhkar.translation: Glory be to Allah (33×), praise be to Allah (33×), Allah is the Greatest (33×), and to complete one hundred: there is no god but Allah alone…
